name: 7 UX principles (2026 refresh)
description: User-centricity, consistency, hierarchy, context, user control, accessibility, usability — with AI-era notes and practical application.

metadata.intent: Apply foundational UX principles (including accessibility and user control) to modern products

must_not: Ship AI/automation that removes user understanding and control
conventions: Use hierarchy to prevent AI-generated content overload.

steps.description: User-centricity: prioritize real user needs over internal assumptions; validate with research/testing.
Consistency: predictable components and behaviors reduce cognitive load; respect platform conventions where relevant.
Hierarchy: IA + visual hierarchy; show what matters most first; progressively reveal detail.
Context: design for device + environment + user emotional state; simplify when users are mobile/stressed/distracted.
User control: undo/redo, cancel, back navigation, safe exits; critical for automation and AI suggestions.
Accessibility: contrast, semantics, keyboard, screen readers, motion safety; design for disabilities and situational constraints.
Usability: learnability, efficiency, memorability, error recovery, satisfaction; measure via task success + time on task + sentiment.
